headline: Coca Cola (KO) Faces Walmart Price Cuts, Is It Still Overvalued?
summary: Walmart’s decision to cut prices on Coca-Cola (KO) 24-packs and other summer items has put the spotlight on Coca-Cola’s pricing power, just as investors watch for the company’s second quarter earnings later this month. See our latest analysis for Coca-Cola. Coca-Cola’s share price has pulled back 1.4% in the latest session to US$82.96 after touching fresh highs recently. However, a 4.4% 1 month share price return and 20.0% year to date share price return suggest momentum has been building,...

headline: Why global hotel chains keep growing
summary: Global hotel chains continue to strengthen their market position by expanding franchise networks, investing in loyalty programmes, and using technology to reach more travellers.
